title: EAP Permission Profile
description: Declares allowed skills and per-skill resource/safety constraints for an EAP.

allowed_skills.description: List of skill identifiers this EAP is permitted to execute.

skill_permissions.description: Per-skill permission declarations specifying actuator access and risk level.

actuators.description: Hardware resources this skill requires (e.g., arm, gripper, camera).

risk_level.description: Declared risk level of this skill.
